# ToolZen — Complete Tool Reference

> 21 free online tools. Privacy-first, no upload needed.
> All processing happens in your browser (no backend).
> Available in Chinese (zh) and English (en). URLs follow /{lang}/{slug}/ pattern.
> Categories: dev(6), text(3), image(2), crypto(3), calculators(6), life(1)

## Developer Tools

### JSON Formatter
Formats, validates, and compresses JSON data with real-time syntax highlighting.
Use for: debugging API responses, validating config files, minifying JSON for production.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/json-formatter/

### Base64 Encoder/Decoder
Encodes text to Base64 and decodes Base64 back. Full Unicode support.
Use for: embedding images as Data URIs, encoding binary data for text protocols, API payload encoding.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/base64/

### UUID Generator
Generates UUID v4 identifiers using crypto.randomUUID(). Batch generation.
Use for: database primary keys, unique tokens, distributed system IDs, session identifiers.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/uuid-generator/

### RegEx Tester
Tests regular expressions against sample text with real-time match highlighting.
Use for: debugging regex patterns, verifying capture groups, testing edge cases before coding.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/regex-tester/

### Color Picker
Converts between HEX, RGB, and HSL color formats. Includes palette and eyedropper.
Use for: web and UI design, CSS color selection, brand color extraction, accessibility contrast checking.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/color-picker/

### Unix Timestamp Converter
Converts between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates. Second and millisecond precision.
Use for: debugging time-related bugs, converting log timestamps, date arithmetic in programming.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/timestamp-converter/

## Text Tools

### Text Diff Checker
Compares two texts line-by-line using standard diff algorithm. Side-by-side and unified views.
Use for: code review, document version comparison, tracking configuration file changes.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/text-diff/

### Word Counter
Counts characters, words, lines, paragraphs, and bytes in real-time. Chinese text aware.
Use for: writing with word limits, SEO meta description length checking, translation cost estimation.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/word-counter/

### Case Converter
Converts text between uppercase, lowercase, title case, simplified/traditional Chinese, Chinese numeral forms.
Use for: formatting titles and headings, preparing content for different Chinese regions, invoice number conversion.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/case-converter/

## Image Tools

### QR Code Generator
Generates QR codes from URLs, text, or contact info. Customizable colors and sizes. PNG download.
Use for: sharing links, Wi-Fi credentials, business cards, marketing materials, event tickets.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/qr-code/

### Image Compressor
Compresses PNG, JPEG, and WebP images with adjustable quality. All processing local.
Use for: optimizing web images for faster page loads, reducing bandwidth usage, preparing images for email.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/image-compress/

## Crypto & Encoding

### MD5 / SHA Hash Generator
Computes MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 hashes for text strings and files. Local computation.
Use for: file integrity verification, checksums, data deduplication, legacy password hashing (SHA-256 recommended).
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/md5-hash/

### URL Encoder/Decoder
Encodes and decodes URL special characters using encodeURI/decodeURI.
Use for: handling URL parameters with special characters, encoding Chinese text in URLs, debugging query strings.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/url-encode/

### Password Generator
Generates cryptographically secure random passwords using crypto.getRandomValues(). Customizable length (4-64) and character types.
Use for: creating strong account passwords, generating API keys, creating secure tokens and secrets.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/password-generator/

## Calculators

### Mortgage Calculator
Calculates monthly payments and total interest. Supports equal payment and equal principal methods. Detailed amortization schedule.
Use for: home loan planning, comparing bank loan offers, early repayment analysis, buy-vs-rent calculations.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/mortgage-calculator/

### BMI Calculator
Calculates Body Mass Index with WHO health status classification (underweight/normal/overweight/obese).
Use for: personal health tracking, weight management goal setting, fitness program planning.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/bmi-calculator/

### Date Calculator
Calculates days between dates, workdays (excluding weekends), and date addition/subtraction.
Use for: project deadline planning, contract duration calculation, age and anniversary counting.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/date-calculator/

### Timezone Converter
Converts time between IANA timezones with daylight saving time awareness. Shows multiple timezones.
Use for: scheduling international meetings, travel planning across time zones, remote team coordination.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/timezone-converter/

### Age Calculator
Calculates precise age in years, months, and days from birth date. Shows next birthday countdown.
Use for: age verification forms, birthday party planning, calculating exact age for official documents.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/age-calculator/

### Unit Converter
Real-time conversion between 34 units across 6 categories: length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed.
Use for: cooking measurements, travel unit conversion, engineering calculations, education and homework.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/unit-converter/

## Life Tools

### Zodiac & Constellation Finder
Finds Chinese zodiac animal (12-animal cycle) and Western constellation (12 star signs) from birth date.
Use for: personal interest and self-discovery, cultural exploration, gift and compatibility ideas.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/zodiac-finder/

## Blog — Tool Guides & Tutorials

The ToolZen blog publishes guides and tutorials for getting the most out of online tools.
Blog home: https://tool-zen.com/zh/blog/

### Top 10 Online Tools Every Developer Needs
A curated list of 10 essential online tools for frontend and backend development — JSON formatter, Base64 encoder, regex tester, and more. All free, no installation required.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/blog/dev-tools-top10/

### How to Use a JSON Formatter — 5 Practical Scenarios
5 classic use cases for a JSON formatter, from API debugging to config file management. Make reading and debugging JSON painless.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/blog/json-formatter-guide/

### The Complete Guide to Online Image Compression
How to dramatically reduce image file size without noticeable quality loss. Compression strategies compared across PNG, JPEG, and WebP formats.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/blog/image-compress-guide/

### Equal Payment or Equal Principal? Let a Mortgage Calculator Do the Math
A detailed comparison of equal monthly payment vs. equal principal repayment methods. Use a mortgage calculator to see the total interest and monthly payment for each option.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/blog/mortgage-calculator-guide/

### Is Your Password Strong Enough? A Guide to Secure Passwords
What makes a password truly secure? How long should it be? How often should you change it? Includes an online password generator for creating strong random passwords instantly.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/blog/password-security-guide/

## About ToolZen

ToolZen is a collection of free online tools focused on privacy and simplicity. Unlike many similar sites, all processing happens locally in the user's browser. No data ever leaves the user's device — ToolZen has no backend servers. The site is built with Astro 6, Preact, and Tailwind CSS 4, deployed on Cloudflare Pages. Available in Chinese and English at https://tool-zen.com.
